files_changed.description: Added PromptCacheStats struct and statistics tracking to SessionPromptCacheStore. Stats tracked for system_prompt_hits, system_prompt_misses, system_prompt_expired, user_context_hits, user_context_misses, user_context_expired. New get_stats() method added.

notes: Added std::sync::{Arc, Mutex} import for thread-safe stats
PromptCacheStats uses Arc<Mutex<>> for thread-safe sharing across clones of the store
Statistics are incremented inside lookup methods using lock().unwrap()
Added 6 new statistics tests covering hits, misses, and expired cases for both system_prompt and user_context lookups
